CVE-2020-22402.title: Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SOGo Web Mail before  ...
CVE-2020-22402.description: Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SOGo Web Mail before 4.3.1 allows attackers to obtain user sensitive information when a user reads an email containing malicious code.

CVE-2021-33054.title: SOGo 2.x before 2.4.1 and 3.x through 5.x before 5.1.1 does not v ...
CVE-2021-33054.description: SOGo 2.x before 2.4.1 and 3.x through 5.x before 5.1.1 does not validate the signatures of any SAML assertions it receives. Any actor with network access to the deployment could impersonate users when SAML is the authentication method. (Only versions after 2.0.5a are affected.)

CVE-2022-4556.title: A vulnerability was found in Alinto SOGo up to 5.7.1 and classifi ...
CVE-2022-4556.description: A vulnerability was found in Alinto SOGo up to 5.7.1 and classified as problematic. Affected by this issue is the function _migrateMailIdentities of the file SoObjects/SOGo/SOGoUserDefaults.m of the component Identity Handler. The manipulation of the argument fullName leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. Upgrading to version 5.8.0 is able to address this issue. The name of the patch is efac49ae91a4a325df9931e78e543f707a0f8e5e. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-215960.

CVE-2022-4558.title: A vulnerability was found in Alinto SOGo up to 5.7.1. It has been ...
CVE-2022-4558.description: A vulnerability was found in Alinto SOGo up to 5.7.1. It has been classified as problematic. This affects an unknown part of the file SoObjects/SOGo/NSString+Utilities.m of the component Folder/Mail Handler. The manipulation leads to cross site scripting. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. Upgrading to version 5.8.0 is able to address this issue. The name of the patch is 1e0f5f00890f751e84d67be4f139dd7f00faa5f3. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The identifier VDB-215961 was assigned to this vulnerability.

CVE-2023-48104.title: Alinto SOGo before 5.9.1 is vulnerable to HTML Injection.
CVE-2023-48104.description: Alinto SOGo before 5.9.1 is vulnerable to HTML Injection.

CVE-2024-24510.title: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Alinto SOGo before 5.10.0 a ...
CVE-2024-24510.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Alinto SOGo before 5.10.0 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the import function to the mail component.

CVE-2024-34462.title: Alinto SOGo through 5.10.0 allows XSS during attachment preview.
CVE-2024-34462.description: Alinto SOGo through 5.10.0 allows XSS during attachment preview.

CVE-2025-50340.title: An Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) vulnerability was disc ...
CVE-2025-50340.description: An Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) vulnerability was discovered in SOGo Webmail thru 5.6.0, allowing an authenticated user to send emails on behalf of other users by manipulating a user-controlled identifier in the email-sending request. The server fails to verify whether the authenticated user is authorized to use the specified sender identity, resulting in unauthorized message delivery as another user. This can lead to impersonation, phishing, or unauthorized communication within the system. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because the only effective way to prevent this sender spoofing is on the SMTP server, not within a client such as SOGo.

CVE-2025-53603.title: In Alinto SOPE SOGo 2.0.2 through 5.12.2, sope-core/NGExtensions/ ...
CVE-2025-53603.description: In Alinto SOPE SOGo 2.0.2 through 5.12.2, sope-core/NGExtensions/NGHashMap.m allows a NULL pointer dereference and SOGo crash via a request in which a parameter in the query string is a duplicate of a parameter in the POST body.

CVE-2025-63498.title: alinto SOGo 5.12.3 is vulnerable to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vi ...
CVE-2025-63498.description: alinto SOGo 5.12.3 is vulnerable to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) via the "userName" parameter.

CVE-2025-63499.title: Alinto Sogo 5.12.3 is vulnerable to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vi ...
CVE-2025-63499.description: Alinto Sogo 5.12.3 is vulnerable to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) via the theme parameter.

CVE-2026-3054.title: A vulnerability was identified in Alinto SOGo 5.12.3/5.12.4. This ...
CVE-2026-3054.description: A vulnerability was identified in Alinto SOGo 5.12.3/5.12.4. This impacts an unknown function. The manipulation of the argument hint leads to cross site scripting. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.
